about.title: Making Every Gift
about.companyDesc: A US-registered limited liability company building creative tools for everyone.
about.missionText: At TagPrintly.com, we believe great design should be accessible to everyone — not just professionals. With a wide variety of beautiful templates, we empower you to unleash your creativity and make your gifts truly memorable.
about.feat1Desc: Explore a vast collection of designs tailored to suit any occasion, all created with an emphasis on quality and style.
about.feat2Desc: With our user-friendly editor, you can effortlessly customize every element — from colors and text to layout and images.
about.feat3Desc: Easily download your creations in print-ready formats or print directly from our platform in seconds.
about.feat4Desc: Experiment with layered and handmade effects, such as 3D enhancements, to bring your tags to life.
about.why1Desc: From simple and elegant to fun and festive, our designs cover a range of themes, giving you endless choices.
about.why2Desc: No special design skills needed — our intuitive interface lets you create and print in just minutes.
about.why3Desc: Get beautiful, high-quality prints without the high costs of custom design services.
about.ctaSub: Join thousands of happy users and design your first gift tag today — it's completely free.

contact.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.sub: Have a question, suggestion or just want to say hello? Fill in the form and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.successMsg: Thank you for contacting us! We will get back to you shortly.
contact.errorMsg: Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again later.

pricing.heroSub: Buy designs individually for €2 each — or subscribe and get unlimited access to all premium templates, new releases included.
pricing.freeDesc: Browse, customize and preview any design. Export with watermark.
pricing.singleDesc: Pay once, own that design forever. Great for one-off projects.
pricing.proDesc: Unlimited access to every premium template — new designs every week.
pricing.faq1Q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
pricing.faq1A: Yes, you can cancel at any time from your account settings. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq2Q: What's included in the free plan?
pricing.faq2A: All free templates are available at no cost. You can customize and export them — they will include a small watermark.
pricing.faq3Q: How does the single design purchase work?
pricing.faq3A: Pay €2 once and unlock that specific design forever. No subscription needed — great for one-off projects.
pricing.faq4A: Yes! The Pro annual plan at €70/year gives your whole team unlimited access. Contact us for volume licensing.
pricing.ctaSub: Start free — no credit card required.

faq.title: Gift Tag FAQs
faq.sub: Answers to common questions about creating and printing custom gift tags
